{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Emperor’s throne room (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The throne room is located in the royal palace.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
